summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The TCW Transform Systems ETF (PWRD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US equities that are considered to be driving and benefiting from the energy transformation. Stocks can be from any economic sector but generally are from carbon-intensive industries such as energy, agriculture, and transportation and have a strategy to reduce or enable decarbonization at scale. PWRD was launched on Feb 2, 2022 and is issued by TCW.
